name: Miglior Canned Cat Food - Fish Chunks, 405g
description: Delight your cat with a high-protein, flavor-packed meal made from real fish chunks in a savory gravy. Specially formulated to support your cat’s daily health and nutrition, this recipe offers the goodness of the sea in every bite. Real Fish Chunks: Rich in natural protein and Omega-3 fatty acids to support heart health, brain function, and shiny coat. Tasty Gravy Base: Moist, flavorful, and perfect for encouraging a healthy appetite—even in fussy eaters. Balanced for Daily Wellness Fortified with essential vitamins, taurine, and minerals to support immunity, digestion, and vitality. Why Your Cat Will Love It: All-Natural Ingredients – No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives Tender, Flaky Texture – Chunks in gravy cats can’t resist Shiny Coat & Skin Support – With Omega-3 from fish oils Immune & Digestive Support – Enriched with vitamins and minerals Complete & Balanced – Ideal for everyday feeding COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives 30%, fish and fish derivatives (salmon 5%), cereals, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Moisture 77%, Crude protein 8.5%, Crude fat 4.8%, Crude fibres 0.5%, Crude ash 3%. Nutritional additives / kg: Vitamin E 10 mg, Copper (Copper (II) sulphate pentahydrate) 2 mg. HOW TO USE: Serve as is at room temperature for best aroma and taste Mix with dry kibble for added variety and flavor Adjust portions based on your cat’s weight, age, and activity level Refrigerate unused portion and use within 48 hours STORAGE INSTRUCTION: Store the product in a cool and dry place, avoiding direct sunlight. Once opened, store in refrigerator for 2-3 days.
